rationale: ADR fitness + ownership for the R3 additions all hold at 77d8a1a9. gitutil.BranchExistsE seam: internal/gitutil/** is execution-owned (execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml:4) and the spec attributes BranchExistsE to execution in both Impacted Domains (:29) and Scope (:53). A workflow-owned gate consuming an execution-owned git-IO seam is the correct layering and matches ADR-0030 (executor is the git-IO boundary). Lifecycle ownership move intact: grep -l 'internal/lifecycle' returns exactly the single workflow path; execution no longer claims it — exactly one claimant (AC10 empirically RED-safe). ADR-0035 touchpoint (:37) now encodes the two message shapes: with-branch/merged-but-undeleted -> final line 'mindspec complete <bead>'; branch-less -> a distinct restoration-prerequisite recourse (restore bead/<id> ref, then complete), because a bare complete dies at complete.go:492-494 merge-base (grounding confirmed). ADR-0035's 'safe to paste'/final-line-genuine rule (lines 42/46/76) is satisfied by both shapes; recovery_convention_test.go (internal/guard AST walk) is unaffected (no new guard constructor there), and the per-site HasFinalRecoveryLine obligation is pinned by AC1/AC6 in internal/approve. ADR-0037 amendment reach (every merging verb, single settlement surface, refusal != gate decision) is coherent with the unchanged §7 hatch / §8 agent-writable semantics — no contradiction. ADR-0023 unchanged and consistent. Import-cycle rationale verified: approve does not import complete; complete imports executor (:15), so AC7's split is sound. No ADR misfit or ownership mis-attribution.

findings.1_branch_probe_failopen_BranchExistsE: ADDRESSED — gitutil.BranchExistsE added as execution-owned seam beside unchanged BranchExists (gitops.go:94-100 confirmed); attributed to execution in Impacted Domains (:29) and Scope (:53); 4th fail-closed leg + AC1 TestApproveImpl_BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed. Ownership layering matches ADR-0030.
findings.2_ac_discriminators: ADDRESSED — ScanOrphanedClosedBeads has 0 code hits at 77d8a1a9 (AC4 anchor genuinely RED); no ADR/ownership concern on this lens.
findings.3_ac7_import_cycle: ADDRESSED — grounding confirmed (approve !import complete; complete import executor at complete.go:15); AC7 split into complete-local + approve-local tests avoids the complete->approve->complete cycle. No ADR misfit.
findings.4_branchless_recovery_truthful_ADR0035: ADDRESSED — ADR-0035 touchpoint (:37) updated for two distinct message shapes; branch-less names restoration prerequisite instead of the bare command that errors at complete.go:492-494 merge-base (confirmed). Final-line-genuine + safe-to-paste rule holds for both; recovery_convention_test.go (guard AST walk) unaffected; per-site rule pinned by AC1/AC6.
findings.6_ac10_exactly_one_claimant: ADDRESSED — grep -l 'internal/lifecycle' across all domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml returns exactly workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml (:9); execution file has no lifecycle claim. Exactly-one-claimant == workflow invariant holds empirically.
findings.7_cmd_overdeclared_and_execution_selfown: ADDRESSED — cmd/** dropped from the workflow Impacted-Domains declaration (:31), no cmd/ file in scope; execution self-ownership OWNERSHIP.yaml gap evidence-refuted as pre-existing and out of scope (:31), consistent with the unchanged execution OWNERSHIP.yaml at 77d8a1a9.
